speaker: Pengguna
original_text: kenapa posisi saya ditutup paksa? saya tidak setuju
translated_to_english: why was my position forcefully closed? I do not agree

speaker: Agen
original_text: Halo, posisi Anda ditutup karena margin level di bawah 50%
translated_to_english: Hello, your position was closed because the margin level is below 50%

speaker: Pengguna
original_text: tapi saya rugi 1500 USD karena ini
translated_to_english: but I lost 1500 USD because of this

speaker: Agen
original_text: Saya mengerti. Sistem kami otomatis menutup posisi untuk melindungi akun Anda
translated_to_english: I understand. Our system automatically closes positions to protect your account

speaker: Pengguna
original_text: lindungi? saya rugi besar! ini penipuan
translated_to_english: protect? I have lost a lot! this is a scam

speaker: Agen
original_text: Saya mengerti perasaan Anda. Margin call dijelaskan di syarat dan ketentuan.
translated_to_english: I understand your feelings. Margin call is explained in the terms and conditions.
